swap.need_clarification:
I didn't quite catch your shift swap request. I need to know:
1️⃣ *Who* you want to swap with (e.g. 'with John' or their phone).
2️⃣ *Which shift* (e.g. 'Monday's shift').
swap.select_own_shift:
🔄 *Shift Swap*

Which of your shifts do you want to swap? Reply with the option number:
swap.no_upcoming_shifts: You have no upcoming shifts to swap.
swap.invalid_choice: That option is invalid. Please reply with a number.
swap.select_target_shift:
You selected your shift on {date}.

Here are the available shifts from your colleagues for that week. Which one do you want?
Reply with the number:
swap.no_target_shifts: There are no other shifts available that week to swap.
swap.confirm_open_prompt:
Please confirm:
Do you want to drop your shift ({myShift}) and take the open shift ({targetShift})?

Reply Yes or No.
swap.open_shift_success: Done! You have successfully taken the open shift and have been unassigned from the previous one.
swap.confirm_prompt:
Please confirm the swap:

*Your shift:* {myShift}
*Requested shift:* {targetShift} (from {targetName})

Reply with *Yes* to confirm or *No* to cancel.
swap.select_swap_type: What kind of shift do you want to swap it for?
swap.notification_target:
🔄 *Shift Swap Request*

*{requesterName}* is asking to swap a shift with you.

To accept, reply: "accept swap"
To reject, reply: "reject swap"
swap.notification_requester: ✉️ Your swap request was sent to *{targetName}*. We will notify you when they respond.

absence.missing_both:
⚠️ To report your absence I need:
1️⃣ The ID of the shift you cannot attend?
2️⃣ The reason for your absence?
absence.missing_shift: ⚠️ What is the ID of the shift you cannot attend?
absence.missing_reason: ⚠️ What is the reason for your absence?
absence.cancelled: Understood. Cancelling the report. To try again, tell me which shift you'll miss.
absence.no_shifts: I didn't find any upcoming shifts assigned to you.
absence.confirm_single_shift:
I see you have a shift on *{shiftStr}*. Is this the shift you're reporting an absence for? (Reply Yes/No)
{reasonPrompt}
absence.reason_prompt: (Also make sure to mention the reason for your absence)
absence.select_shift: You have multiple upcoming shifts that match. Reply with the shift number to report your absence:
absence.reason_prompt_inline: (Please also include the reason for your absence).

day_off.missing_date: Understood. For what *date* do you want to request a day off?

schedule.none_that_week: 📅 You don't have any shifts assigned for the week of {date}.
schedule.none_this_week: 📅 You don't have any shifts assigned for this week.

rules.missing_text: ⚠️ To create a rule, please state the restriction or preference. For example: 'On Fridays I need 2 cashiers'.

general.unknown_intent:
🤔 I didn't quite understand your request. I can help you to:
• View your schedule
• Report an absence
• Request a shift swap
• Request a day off
• Generate the weekly schedule (managers)

What do you need?
general.clarification: ❓ I couldn't understand your request. Can you rephrase it?
general.invalid_choice: Invalid response. Please reply with the option number or 'yes'/'no'.
general.shift_not_found: ⚠️ I couldn't find a shift with ID '{shiftId}'. Please check the ID and try again.
general.error: ⚠️ An error occurred processing your message. Please try again.
general.unauthorized: ⚠️ You do not have permissions to perform this action.
